category_title: ADHD-diagnosed student who seeks social contact and struggles with exclusion and medication-dependent behavior
scenario_title: Listening to task instructions and peer irritation
minimal_context: The whole class is in the classroom listening to the teacher explain the instructions for a task.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Causes a disturbance while the instructions are being given)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jacob, please be quiet. I will repeat the sentence. Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues causing a disturbance instead of listening)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jacob, be quiet. I am going to repeat the same sentence again. Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns around as several children begin to shake their heads and roll their eyes) It is not fair because I do not intentionally wish to ruin it for the others.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

STUDENT: (Causes a disturbance while the instructions are being given)

TUTOR: Jacob, please be quiet. I will repeat the sentence. Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

STUDENT: (Continues causing a disturbance instead of listening)

TUTOR: Jacob, be quiet. I am going to repeat the same sentence again. Class, please listen carefully while I explain what the task is.

STUDENT: (Turns around as several children begin to shake their heads and roll their eyes) It is not fair because I do not intentionally wish to ruin it for the others.

task.content: Listening to teacher's instructions for a task

context.social_setting: Whole class listening to the teacher explain what the task is

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As the teacher continues to repeat the same sentence, several children begin to shake their heads or roll their eyes
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Jacob turns around and says that it is not fair
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: feels he does not intentionally wish to ruin it for the others
related_quotes: it is not fair because he does not intentionally wish to ruin it for the others.

behavior_patterns.condition: While the teacher explains what the task is
